rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type annexes for interface behavior and implementation annexes for binding assignments.
Use only visible identifiers from the target component scope when inserting AGREE annex blocks.
generic_rules: AGREE assumptions and guarantees must align with AADL component scope rules.
Implementation-level bindings belong in implementation annexes, not component type annexes.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the analyzed model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Assignments in implementation scope must reference valid output features or declared variables.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Do not mix AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
